code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
mut token = ""
while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          sum = sum + v * 2
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(token)
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    if v > 0
      sum = sum + v * 2
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

println("result=#{sum}")
